name: Creole Brunch Eggs
recipeIngredient: 1 Onion, cut in half and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onion, bell pepper, celery, garlic, bay leaf, and butter in a 2-quart glass measure. Cover with vented plastic wrap.
2. Microwave on high for 5 minutes. Drain liquid from tomatoes into a small bowl; set aside.
3. Coarsely chop tomatoes and add to vegetables in the glass measure.
4. Add tomato juice, Worcestershire sauce, hot sauce, and paprika; stir well. Cover again and microwave on high for 5 minutes.
5. Remove bay leaf. Using a small wire whisk, blend cornstarch into reserved tomato liquid.
6. Stir mixture into heated sauce. Cover again. Stirring midway through cooking, microwave on high for 5 to 6 minutes or until sauce is bubbly hot and thickened.
7. Toast muffins and top with sliced eggs. Top with sauce; serve immediately. Makes 4 servings.
